name: Access of Memory Location Before Start of Buffer
description: The product reads from or writes to a buffer using an index or pointer that references a memory location before the beginning of the buffer. This typically occurs through pointer decrements, invalid pointer arithmetic, or negative array indices.
detection_pattern: INGRESS or TRANSFORM node provides an index or pointer value that flows to a STORAGE node (buffer access) where the computed offset is before the buffer start, without a CONTROL node performing bounds checking for negative offsets.
